formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\begin{cases} q_{i , j}^{up} \geq \left(d_{i , j}^{up} - d_{i - 1 , j}^{up}\right) - \frac{d_{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) , j}^{up} - d_{max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right) - 1 , j}^{up}}{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) - max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right)} , \\ q_{i , j}^{up} \geq - \left(d_{i , j}^{up} - d_{i - 1 , j}^{up}\right) + \frac{d_{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) , j}^{up} - d_{max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right) - 1 , j}^{up}}{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) - max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right)} , \\ q_{i , j}^{dn} \geq \left(d_{i , j}^{dn} - d_{i - 1 , j}^{dn}\right) - \frac{d_{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) , j}^{dn} - d_{max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right) - 1 , j}^{dn}}{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) - max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right)} , \\ q_{i , j}^{dn} \geq - \left(d_{i , j}^{dn} - d_{i - 1 , j}^{dn}\right) + \frac{d_{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) , j}^{dn} - d_{max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right) - 1 , j}^{dn}}{min \left(i + i_{2} , I\right) - max \left(i - i_{1} , 2\right)} . \end{cases}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0037
formulas.latex: p_{i , j}^{up} = \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(t_{k} - d_{i - 1 , j}^{up}\right) x_{i - 1 , j , k}^{up} + \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(d_{i , j}^{up} - t_{k - 1}\right) x_{i , j , k}^{up} .

formulas.label: eq0038
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}p_{i , j}^{up} = & \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(t_{k} - d_{i - 1 , j}^{up}\right) x_{i - 1 , j , k}^{up} + \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(d_{i , j}^{up} - t_{k - 1}\right) x_{i , j , k}^{up} \\ & + \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(\sum_{ℓ = 1}^{k - 1} x_{i - 1 , j , ℓ}^{up} - \sum_{ℓ_{1}}^{k} x_{i , j , ℓ}^{up}\right) \left(t_{k} - t_{k - 1}\right) .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0039
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(t_{k} - d_{i - 1 , j}^{up}\right) x_{i - 1 , j , k}^{up} + \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(d_{i , j}^{up} - t_{k - 1}\right) x_{i , j , k}^{up} \\ & + \sum_{k = 1}^{K} \lambda_{j , k}^{up} \left(\sum_{ℓ = 1}^{k - 1} x_{i - 1 , j , ℓ}^{up} - \sum_{ℓ_{1}}^{k} x_{i , j , ℓ}^{up}\right) \left(t_{k} - t_{k - 1}\right) \leq \sigma_{max} C_{train} ,\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}p_{i , j}^{up} \approx & z_{i , j , 1}^{up , 1} \lambda_{j , 1}^{up} + \left(z_{i , j , 2}^{up , 1} - z_{i , j , 1}^{up , 2}\right) \lambda_{j , 2}^{up} + \hdots + \left(z_{i , j , k}^{up , 1} - z_{i , j , k - 1}^{up , 2}\right) \lambda_{j , k}^{up} + \hdots + \left(z_{i , j , K}^{up , 1} - z_{i , j , K - 1}^{up , 2}\right) \lambda_{j , K}^{up} \\ & - z_{i , j , 1}^{up , 3} \lambda_{j , 1}^{up} - \left(z_{i , j , 2}^{up , 3} - z_{i , j , 1}^{up , 4}\right) \lambda_{j , 2}^{up} - \hdots - \left(z_{i , j , k}^{up , 3} - z_{i , j , k - 1}^{up , 4}\right) \lambda_{j , k}^{up} - \hdots - \left(z_{i , j , K}^{up , 3} - z_{i , j , K - 1}^{up , 4}\right) \lambda_{j , K}^{up} .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0050
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\left(\overset{\sim}{\lambda}\right)_{j}^{up , \text{approx}} \left(t\right) = \begin{cases} \left(\hat{\lambda}\right)_{j , 1}^{up} , & \text{if} t \in \left[t_{0} , t_{1}^{'}\right) \\ \left(\hat{\lambda}\right)_{j , 2}^{up} , & \text{if} t \in \left[t_{1} , t_{2}^{'}\right) \\ \hdots & \hdots \\ \left(\hat{\lambda}\right)_{j , K^{'}}^{up} , & \text{if} t \in \left[t_{K^{'} - 1}^{'} , t_{K^{'}}\right) \end{cases} , \forall j \in \mathbf{J} / \left\{J\right\} .\end{matrix}
